# Veriqo

Veriqo is a HACCP food safety compliance web app for private chefs and mobile caterers in the UK.

- Homepage: https://getveriqo.co.uk
- App: https://getveriqo.co.uk/app
- Operated by: Side Order Catering
- Contact: hello@getveriqo.co.uk

## What Veriqo does

Veriqo helps private chefs and mobile caterers meet UK food hygiene law record-keeping requirements. Features include:

- Fridge and freezer temperature logs
- Cooking, cooling, and reheating temperature records
- Delivery and transport temperature logs
- Cleaning and disinfection records
- Opening and closing checklists
- Allergen declarations and cross-contamination records
- Pest control logs
- Staff illness and injury records
- Staff credentials and certificate tracker with 90-day expiry warnings
- Approved supplier register
- Customer and job records for private chef engagements
- Menu and dish library

Veriqo is designed to meet the record-keeping requirements of the UK Food Safety Act 1990 and the Food Standards Agency's Safer Food Better Business guidance for caterers.

## Carte

Carte is the companion business management app for private chefs, available at https://getveriqo.co.uk/mise

Features include:

- Client CRM with contact history
- Job booking calendar
- Menu and dish library (shared with Veriqo)
- Frozen menu snapshots attached to bookings
- Kitchen assessments
- Allergen logs
- Transport temperature records
- Certificate and credential tracking

## How the apps relate

Veriqo and Carte share one account and one data layer. Clients, menus, dishes, and job bookings sync between both apps automatically. A chef uses Veriqo for daily HACCP compliance records and Carte for business organisation.

Both apps are installable as progressive web apps (PWA) on iPhone and Android.
